text.title: AI Spatial Computing UX Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-spatial-computing.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the spatial interaction satisfy comfort + latency + safety budgets?

conclusion.verdict: REJECT — device cannot host the interaction
REDESIGN — split modality or cache pre-fetched context
BLOCK — add mitigation before spec is approvable
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
